name: 4D Games
short_description: 4D Shapes, 4D Chess and 4D Mazes!? Take a deep dive into the world of Four Dimensions, with more control than ever before!
detailed_description:
Take a deep dive into the world of Four Dimensions! Whether you are interested in the shapes, or want to become a master of 4D Chess, or fancy getting lost in a 4D Maze, 4D Games is full of challenges, colour and confusion!

The Shape Games & The Playground Modes


4D Games includes dozens of shapes for you to play around with through the view of a 3D Cross Section, as well as a series of games that challenge you and your understanding of how these shapes behave!

Make sure to check out the Playground modes too, to really identify the quirks of each shape!

4D Chess


How many moves ahead can you keep track of across the 256 squares spanning the Four Dimensions? Challenge your friends locally or through Steam Remote Play Together to see who really is the master at 4D Chess!

There are 3 board layouts for you to try on a 4x4x4x4 Chess Board. Check out the Steam Workshop to install other players custom board layouts or even create your own!

4D Maze


Fancy a more relaxed game? Take your time gliding along the paths of a 4D Maze! The Mazes are procedurally generated and come in sizes from 3x3x3x3 to 8x8x8x8. It gets pretty hard pretty quickly!

4D Shape Editor


Want to take your abilities with 4D Shapes to the next level? 4D Games includes a Node based Shader Editor that allows you to create totally custom 4D Shapes using Ray Marching. Combine and manipulate shapes, and don't forget to browse the Workshop to see what other players have been getting up to!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese
